profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update your display name and avatar.

security.title: Security
security.description: Manage your email address and password.
security.socialLoginDescription: Your account uses social login. Set a password to also sign in with email.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language used across the app.

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.deactivateOrDeleteDescription: Deactivate hides your account; deletion is permanent and cannot be undone.

feed.notFollowingAnybody: You are not following anybody yet.
feed.savedDescription: Drafts you have bookmarked will appear here.
feed.noSavedSearchResults: No saved drafts match your search.
feed.noSavedDrafts: You have not bookmarked any drafts yet. Tap the bookmark icon on any draft to save it here.
feed.libraryDescription: All your drafts, published or not.
feed.noLibraryDrafts: You have not created a draft yet.
feed.trendingDescription: Most read and liked drafts over the last 30 days.

search.title: Search
search.startTyping: Start typing something to see the results.
search.searchHint: Search for a draft, a user, or a username with '@username'.

aiChat.greetingDescription: I can manage your drafts, search content, and answer questions.

suggestedPrompts.whatCanYouDo: What can you help me with?

aiTools.selectTextError: Please select some text to translate.

draftToolbar.deleteConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to delete this draft? This action is permanent.

draftPage.publishConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to publish this draft? By doing so, everyone will be able to read its content.
draftPage.publishedToast: Draft published, it is now visible in the discovery tab.
draftPage.bookmarkedToast: Draft saved to your reading list.
draftPage.unbookmarkedToast: Draft removed from your reading list.
draftPage.errorToast: Something went wrong, please try again.

newDraftModal.heading: New draft
newDraftModal.introPlaceholder: A short description of what the draft is about
newDraftModal.failedToCreate: Failed to create draft, please try again.
newDraftModal.unsupportedFormat: File format not supported, accepted formats are ".png, .jpg, .jpeg, .gif, .avif, .webp"

deleteAccount.chooseDescription: Choose what you'd like to do with your account.
deleteAccount.deactivateCardDescription: Your account and content will be hidden. You can reactivate anytime by signing back in.
deleteAccount.deleteCardDescription: Your account and all your data will be permanently erased. This cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.deleteWarning: This is permanent and irreversible. All your drafts, comments, and data will be deleted immediately.
deleteAccount.deactivateConfirmation: Your account will be hidden from other users. Sign back in at any time to reactivate it.
deleteAccount.enterPasswordError: Please enter your password to continue.

changeEmail.title: Change email address
changeEmail.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
changeEmail.codeSentTo: We sent a 6-character code to {email}. Enter it below to confirm.
changeEmail.emailMustBeDifferent: New email must be different from your current email.
changeEmail.codeSent: Verification code sent to your new email address.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.socialLoginDescription: Your account uses social login and doesn't have a password yet. Set one below to enable email/password sign-in.
changePassword.codeSentDescription: We sent a 6-character code to your email address. Enter it below to confirm.
changePassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
changePassword.codeSent: Verification code sent to your email address.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.noNotificationsDescription: When someone follows you, likes or comments on your drafts, you'll see it here.
notifications.preferencesDescription: Choose which events you want to be notified about.
notifications.notifyOnLikeDescription: When someone likes one of your drafts
notifications.notifyOnCommentDescription: When someone comments on one of your drafts
